title: NSF Build and Broaden 2.0 Proposal Writing Template
content: Proposal writing template for the NSF Build and Broaden 2.0 program (dated 2023-03-27). Distributed by ORA as a companion resource to Tracy Rone's 2023-02-27 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Strategies for Grant Proposal Development'. Provides a structured outline aligned to NSF Build and Broaden 2.0 solicitation requirements for MSI/HBCU researchers.
